channel.title: Vellixia
channel.description: A realm of swift clarity — open-source tools for AI agents. Local-first, self-hosted, fast.
channel.dc:creator: Andres Holivin

item.title: Vellixia launches: a realm of swift clarity
item.description: Announcing the Vellixia organization and its first public projects: Glia (AI agent skill synthesizer) and Cairn (context & reliability layer for AI agents).

item.title: Glia — AI agent skill synthesizer
item.description: Local-first, air-gappable, graph+vector+causal retrieval over a community catalog. Rust CLI + Hub, SurrealDB, OpenBao, candle embeddings.

item.title: Cairn — context & reliability layer for AI agents
item.description: The open-source context & reliability layer for AI agents — memory, lean context, guardrails, and multi-device sync in one self-hosted Rust binary.
